company: HTC Global Services MSC Sdn Bhd
description: Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services using Node.js . Build and manage RESTful and/or GraphQL APIs for both internal and external systems. Develop, maintain, and support Python-based services, scripts, and automation tools . Collaborate closely with frontend engineers, product managers, and DevOps teams to deliver high-quality solutions. Write unit and integration tests to ensure code quality, reliability, and maintainability. Participate in code reviews and contribute to engineering best practices and standards. Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize application performance. Contribute to system design discussions and prepare clear technical documentation. Requirements 1–4 years of professional experience in software development. Strong proficiency in Node.js and JavaScript/TypeScript . Hands-on experience with Python for backend development or automation. Experience working with SQL and/or NoSQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB). Solid understanding of REST APIs , authentication mechanisms ( JWT/OAuth ), and microservices architecture . Experience using Git and working within modern CI/CD workflows . Basic knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) is an advantage. Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills .
